description: CI-safe runner-to-broker terminal evidence integration fixture. It validates the compact terminalEvidence event shape produced by the worker handler from a synthetic a2a-docker-runner result without Docker, live broker, Telegram, or GitHub writes.

payload.title: Add runner-to-broker terminal evidence integration fixture

runnerOutput.stdout: synthetic stdout intentionally omitted from terminal alert

expectedTerminalEvidence.issueTitle: Add runner-to-broker terminal evidence integration fixture

alert.title: A2A PR: jinwon-int/a2a-docker-runner
alert.body: task=round3-terminal-evidence-94 · worker=sogyo · status=succeeded · exit=0 · timeout=false · artifacts=2 · issue=jinwon-int/a2a-docker-runner#94 · title=Add runner-to-broker te...

expectedTerminalEvidence.reason: PR evidence is available for operator review.

testSummary.label: a2a-docker-runner completed; PR evidence; exit=0; timedOut=false; artifacts=2

authAndRateLimitSafety: Fixture uses synthetic PR/comment URLs only and performs no GitHub or Telegram writes.
Terminal alert body is compact and dedupeKey is stable for broker replay/dedupe.
No token, secret, raw stdout/stderr, or host-specific path is present in the notification payload.
operatorRunbook: 1. Build and run integration tests before enabling broker terminal notifications.
2. Use this fixture as Telegram-safe dry-run input; do not live deploy without explicit operator approval.
3. Confirm broker outbox/dedupe keys match expectedTerminalEvidence.dedupeKey before replay.
4. Validate active targets bangtong, dungae, sogyo, and nosuk only; yukson remains excluded.
